basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 18 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Delhi (AIIMS)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

application_fee.sc_fee: Rs. 2400 (Refundable for those who appear in the interview)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD: 5 years, Government Servant: 5 years, Ex-Servicemen: 5 years.

qualification.education_qualification: DM in Gastroenterology/ Medical Oncology/ Nephrology, M.Ch. in Neurosurgery/ Urology, MD in Nuclear Medicine, MS in Orthopedics
qualification.details: Assistant Professor of Gastroenterology: DM in Gastroenterology (2/3/5/6 years recognized course after MBBS) with one year teaching/research experience (no experience for 3/6 years DM). Assistant Professor of Medical Oncology: DM in Medical Oncology (2/3/5/6 years recognized course after MBBS) with one year teaching/research experience (no experience for 3/6 years DM). Assistant Professor of Nephrology: DM in Nephrology (2/3/5/6 years recognized course after MBBS) with one year teaching/research experience (no experience for 3/6 years DM). Assistant Professor of Neurosurgery: M.Ch. in Neuro-Surgery (2/3/5/6 years recognized course) with one year teaching/research experience (no experience for 3/6 years M.Ch.). Assistant Professor of Nuclear Medicine: MD in Nuclear Medicine with three years teaching/research experience. Assistant Professor of Orthopedics: MS in Orthopedics with three years teaching/research experience. Assistant Professor of Urology: M.Ch. in Urology (2/3/5/6 years recognized course after MBBS) with one year teaching/research experience (no experience for 3/6 years M.Ch.).

selection_process: Screening based on objective criteria (if >10 applications) Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 is 20th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts at AIIMS?
faq.answer: There are a total of 18 vacancies for the Assistant Professor posts across various specializations at AIIMS, New Delhi, as per the recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by specialization but generally include a DM, M.Ch., MD, or MS degree in the relevant medical field, along with specified teaching or research experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Assistant Professor posts is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for AIIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 3000 for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 2400 for SC/ST candidates (refundable upon interview appearance). PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Professor posts will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 1,42,506.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for AIIMS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official AIIMS website to fill out and submit their applications.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a screening based on objective criteria (if applications exceed a certain number), followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for candidates belonging to reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), PwBD (5 years), and Government Servants/Ex-Servicemen (5 years).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page or by visiting the official website of AIIMS, New Delhi.
